# Generated by docs-init — review and set required: yes for policies your project enforces
# Base template: see hd-code-review/CODING_STANDARDS.md in your Claude skills directory (~/.claude/skills/hd-code-review/CODING_STANDARDS.md)

# Coding Standards — ecommerce-backend

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Section 2: Code Style
# ─────────────────────────────────────────

code_style:

  # 2.1 Naming Conventions
  naming:
    files_services:   "kebab-case.suffix.ts — e.g. auth.service.ts, product.repository.ts"
    files_entities:   "PascalCase.ts — e.g. User.ts, OrderItem.ts"
    files_dtos:       "kebab-case.dto.ts — e.g. create-product.dto.ts"
    classes:          "PascalCase with role suffix — UserRepository, ProductService, AuthController, JwtUtil"
    enums_name:       "PascalCase — UserRole, OrderStatus, PaymentMethod"
    enums_members:    "SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE with lowercase string values — ADMIN = 'admin', PENDING = 'pending'"
    interfaces:       "PascalCase, no I-prefix — JwtPayload, TokenPair"
    variables:        "camelCase — userRepo, hashedPassword, emailVerificationToken"
    methods:          "camelCase, verb-first — findById, createPayment, verifySignature"

  # 2.2 Patterns to Follow
  patterns_follow:

    error_handling:
      rule: Use AppError subclasses for all thrown errors
      subclasses:
        - ValidationError    # 400 — invalid input
        - UnauthorizedError  # 401 — missing or bad auth
        - NotFoundError      # 404 — resource not found
        - AppError           # base — all other cases
      import: "from src/errors/index.ts"

    http_responses:
      rule: Use ResponseUtil for all HTTP responses
      methods:
        - ResponseUtil.success(res, data, message, statusCode)
        - ResponseUtil.created(res, data, message)
        - ResponseUtil.error(res, message, statusCode, errors)
        - ResponseUtil.noContent(res)
      note: Never call res.json() directly from a controller

    input_validation:
      rule: Use class-validator decorators on DTOs for all input validation
      rule2: Validation is applied in middleware only — validateBody() or validateQuery()
      note: Controllers receive already-validated req.body / req.query — do not re-validate inside controllers

    caching:
      rule: Use CacheUtil wrapper only — no direct ioredis/redis client calls outside CacheUtil
      methods:
        - CacheUtil.set(key, value, ttl)
        - CacheUtil.get<T>(key)
        - CacheUtil.del(key)
        - CacheUtil.delPattern(pattern)

    multi_step_writes:
      rule: Write operations spanning more than one repository table must use a QueryRunner transaction
      reference: CheckoutService — canonical example

    payment_verification:
      rule: All VNPay and MoMo callback/webhook handlers must call signature verification before any processing
      vnpay: VNPayUtil.verifyReturnUrl() / VNPayUtil.verifyIpnUrl()
      momo:  MomoUtil.verifySignature()

  # 2.3 Patterns to Avoid
  patterns_avoid:

    logging:
      avoid: console.log in production code
      current_practice: console.error for errors (no structured logger yet)
      note: winston is listed as a dependency but not yet wired in

    database:
      avoid: Direct TypeORM DataSource access outside repository constructors
      avoid2: "synchronize: true in any TypeORM DataSource config"
      rationale: "synchronize: true drops and recreates columns in production"

    errors:
      avoid: Throwing raw Error objects to the HTTP layer
      use_instead: AppError subclasses always

    validation:
      avoid: Bypassing validateBody() or validateQuery() in controllers
      avoid2: Manually calling plainToInstance / validate inside controllers

    entities_in_responses:
      avoid: Passing TypeORM entity objects directly to ResponseUtil or res.json()
      rationale: Entities may carry sensitive fields (password, passwordResetToken, gatewayResponse)

  # 2.4 Project-Specific Patterns
  project_patterns:

    language:
      rule: All user-facing message strings in ResponseUtil calls and AppError messages must be in Vietnamese
      examples:
        correct:   "'Tạo thanh toán thành công'"
        incorrect: "'Payment created successfully'"

    admin_routes:
      rule: Admin-only routes are prefixed /api/admin/*
      controllers: "src/controllers/admin/"
      routes:      "src/routes/admin/"

    order_item_pricing:
      rule: Order item prices are immutable after creation (snapshot pattern)
      rationale: Preserves historical pricing accuracy regardless of future product price changes

    entity_serialization:
      rule: Never pass TypeORM entity objects directly to ResponseUtil — select only the fields needed
      special_case: Payment.gatewayResponse must be excluded from customer-facing responses

    dependency_injection:
      rule: Follow manual DI pattern — services instantiate repos in class body, controllers instantiate service as module-level constant
      note: No IoC container — do not introduce one without team discussion

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Section 3: Project Policies
# ─────────────────────────────────────────

project_policies:

  feature_flags:
    required: no
    note: No feature flag system is configured in this project

  observability:
    required: no
    note: Structured logging not yet added; console.error is current practice for errors

  i18n:
    required: no
    note: Vietnamese is the single supported locale; no i18n framework is in use
    rule: All user-facing strings are hardcoded in Vietnamese — do not introduce an i18n library without team discussion
